title: CreateFirmaCraft - Core
description: This is a core mod for CreateFirmaCraft modpack
body:
This is the base mod for the CreateFirmaCraft modpack, a modpack that aims to combine Create and TFC.

I don't think you need to download this mod separately from the CreateFirmaCraft modpack...

There are mechanics implemented here that I couldn't or didn't want to implement through kubejs.
